locations: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

pokemon.name: bulbasaur

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

pokemon.flavorText: There is a plant seed on its back right from the day this POKéMON is born. The seed slowly grows larger.

pokemon.name: ivysaur
pokemon.flavorText: There is a plant bulb on its back. When it absorbs nutrients, the bulb is said to blossom into a large flower.

pokemon.name: venusaur
pokemon.flavorText: A bewitching aroma wafts from its flower. The fragrance becalms those engaged in a battle.

pokemon.name: charmander

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

pokemon.flavorText: From the time it is born, a flame burns at the tip of its tail. Its life would end if the flame were to go out.

pokemon.name: charmeleon
pokemon.flavorText: It lashes about with its tail to knock down its foe. It then tears up the fallen opponent with sharp claws.

pokemon.name: charizard
pokemon.flavorText: Its wings can carry this POKéMON close to an altitude of 4,600 feet. It blows out fire at very high temperatures.

pokemon.name: squirtle

encounters.notes: Choose as starter from Prof. Oak (1 of 3 choices)

pokemon.flavorText: When it retracts its long neck into its shell, it squirts out water with vigorous force.

pokemon.name: wartortle
pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON is very popular as a pet. Its fur-covered tail is a symbol of its longevity.

pokemon.name: blastoise
pokemon.flavorText: It crushes its foe under its heavy body to cause fainting. In a pinch, it will withdraw inside its shell.

pokemon.name: caterpie
pokemon.flavorText: It is covered with a green skin. When it grows, it sheds the skin, covers itself with silk, and becomes a cocoon.

pokemon.name: metapod
pokemon.flavorText: Even though it is encased in a sturdy shell, the body inside is tender. It can’t withstand a harsh attack.

pokemon.name: butterfree
pokemon.flavorText: The wings are protected by rain-repellent dust. As a result, this POKéMON can fly about even in rain.

pokemon.name: weedle
pokemon.flavorText: Often found in forests and grasslands. It has a sharp, toxic barb of around two inches on top of its head.

pokemon.name: kakuna
pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON is in a temporary stage while making its body. It is almost completely unable to move on its own.

pokemon.name: beedrill
pokemon.flavorText: May appear in a swarm. Flies at violent speeds, all the while stabbing with the toxic stinger on its rear.

pokemon.name: pidgey
pokemon.flavorText: Does not like to fight. It hides in tall grass and so on, foraging for food such as small bugs.

pokemon.name: pidgeotto
pokemon.flavorText: The claws on its feet are well developed. It can carry prey such as an EXEGGCUTE to its nest over 60 miles away.

pokemon.name: pidgeot
pokemon.flavorText: It spreads its gorgeous wings widely to intimidate enemies. It races through the skies at Mach-2 speed.

pokemon.name: rattata
pokemon.flavorText: Its fangs are long and very sharp. They grow continuously, so it gnaws on hard things to whittle them down.

pokemon.name: raticate
pokemon.flavorText: Its rear feet have three toes each. They are webbed, enabling it to swim across rivers.

pokemon.name: spearow
pokemon.flavorText: It busily flits around here and there. Even if it is frail, it can be a tough foe that uses MIRROR MOVE.

pokemon.name: fearow
pokemon.flavorText: Its huge and magnificent wings can keep it aloft in the sky. It can remain flying a whole day without landing.

pokemon.name: ekans
pokemon.flavorText: A very common sight in grassland, etc. It flicks its tongue in and out to sense danger in its surroundings.

pokemon.name: arbok
pokemon.flavorText: The pattern on its belly appears to be a frightening face. Weak foes will flee just at the sight of the pattern.

pokemon.name: pikachu
pokemon.flavorText: It has small electric sacs on both its cheeks. If threatened, it looses electric charges from the sacs.

pokemon.name: raichu
pokemon.flavorText: Its electric charges can reach even 100,000 volts. Careless contact can cause even an Indian elephant to faint.

pokemon.name: sandshrew
pokemon.flavorText: It burrows and lives underground. If threatened, it curls itself up into a ball for protection.

pokemon.name: sandslash
pokemon.flavorText: It is adept at attacking with the spines on its back and its sharp claws while quickly scurrying about.

pokemon.name: nidoran-f
pokemon.flavorText: Though small, it must be treated with caution because of its powerfully toxic barbs. The female has smaller horns.

pokemon.name: nidorina
pokemon.flavorText: The female has a gentle temperament. It emits ultrasonic cries that have the power to befuddle foes.

pokemon.name: nidoqueen
pokemon.flavorText: The body is covered by stiff, needle- like scales. If it becomes excited, the needles bristle outwards.

pokemon.name: nidoran-m
pokemon.flavorText: Its large ears are flapped like wings when it is listening to distant sounds. It extends toxic barbs when angered.

pokemon.name: nidorino
pokemon.flavorText: It is easily angered. By swinging its well- developed horn wildly, it can even punch through diamond.

pokemon.name: nidoking
pokemon.flavorText: It is recognized by its rock-hard hide and its extended horn. Be careful with the horn as it contains venom.

pokemon.name: clefairy
pokemon.flavorText: Its adorable appearance makes it popular as a pet. However, it is rare and difficult to find.

pokemon.name: clefable
pokemon.flavorText: It has an acute sense of hearing. It can easily hear a pin being dropped nearly 1,100 yards away.

pokemon.name: vulpix
pokemon.flavorText: While young, it has six gorgeous tails. When it grows, several new tails are sprouted.

pokemon.name: ninetales
pokemon.flavorText: It has nine long tails and fur that gleams gold. It is said to live for 1,000 years.

pokemon.name: jigglypuff
pokemon.flavorText: It captivates foes with its huge, round eyes, then lulls them to sleep by singing a soothing melody.

pokemon.name: wigglytuff
pokemon.flavorText: Its fur is extremely fine, dense, and supple. The exquisitely pleasant fur conveys an image of luxury.

pokemon.name: zubat
pokemon.flavorText: It has no eyes. Instead, it relies on its ultrasonic cries for echo location to flit about in darkness.

pokemon.name: golbat
pokemon.flavorText: It clamps down on its prey with needle- sharp fangs and drains over 10 ounces of blood in one gulp.

pokemon.name: oddish
pokemon.flavorText: Its scientific name is “Oddium Wanderus.” At night, it is said to walk nearly 1,000 feet on its two roots.

pokemon.name: gloom
pokemon.flavorText: Its pistils exude an incredibly foul odor. The horrid stench can cause fainting at a distance of 1.25 miles.

pokemon.name: vileplume
pokemon.flavorText: Its petals are the largest in the world. It fiendishly scatters allergy-causing pollen from its petals.

pokemon.name: paras
pokemon.flavorText: Growing out of the bug’s back are mushrooms called tochukaso. The mushrooms grow with the bug host.

pokemon.name: parasect
pokemon.flavorText: It scatters toxic spores from the mushroom cap. In China, the spores are used as herbal medicine.

pokemon.name: venonat
pokemon.flavorText: Its eyes act as radar, enabling it to be active in darkness. The eyes can also shoot powerful beams.

pokemon.name: venomoth
pokemon.flavorText: The wings are covered with dustlike scales. Every time it flaps its wings, it looses highly toxic dust.

pokemon.name: diglett
pokemon.flavorText: It burrows through the ground at a shallow depth. It leaves raised earth in its wake, making it easy to spot.

pokemon.name: dugtrio
pokemon.flavorText: In battle, it digs through the ground and strikes the unsuspecting foe from an unexpected direction.

pokemon.name: meowth
pokemon.flavorText: All it does is sleep during the daytime. At night, it patrols its territory with its eyes aglow.

pokemon.name: persian
pokemon.flavorText: Has a vicious temperament. Beware if it raises its tail straight up. It is a signal that it is about to pounce and bite.

pokemon.name: psyduck
pokemon.flavorText: It is constantly wracked by a headache. When the headache turns intense, it begins using mysterious powers.

pokemon.name: golduck
pokemon.flavorText: The forelegs are webbed, helping to make it an adept swimmer. It can be seen swimming elegantly in lakes, etc.

pokemon.name: mankey
pokemon.flavorText: Light and agile on its feet, and ferocious in temperament. When angered, it flies into an uncontrollable frenzy.

pokemon.name: primeape
pokemon.flavorText: It is always outrageously furious. If it gives chase, it will tenaciously track the target no matter how far.

pokemon.name: growlithe
pokemon.flavorText: Very friendly and faithful to people. It will try to repel enemies by barking and biting.

pokemon.name: arcanine
pokemon.flavorText: A POKéMON that is described in Chinese legends. It is said to race at an unbelievable speed.

pokemon.name: poliwag
pokemon.flavorText: Its slick black skin is thin and damp. A part of its internal organs can be seen through the skin as a spiral pattern.

pokemon.name: poliwhirl
pokemon.flavorText: Its two legs are well developed. Even though it can live on the ground, it prefers living in water.

pokemon.name: poliwrath
pokemon.flavorText: An adept swimmer, it knows the front crawl, butterfly, and more. It is faster than the best human swimmers.

pokemon.name: abra
pokemon.flavorText: It sleeps for 18 hours a day. It uses a variety of extrasensory powers even while asleep.

pokemon.name: kadabra
pokemon.flavorText: It happened one morning - a boy with extrasensory powers awoke in bed transformed into KADABRA.

pokemon.name: alakazam
pokemon.flavorText: It does not like physical attacks very much. Instead, it freely uses extra­ sensory powers to defeat foes.

pokemon.name: machop

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

pokemon.flavorText: Its whole body is composed of muscles. Even though it’s the size of a human child, it can hurl 100 grown-ups.

pokemon.name: machoke

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

pokemon.flavorText: Its formidable body never gets tired. It helps people by doing work such as the moving of heavy goods.

pokemon.name: machamp
pokemon.flavorText: Its four ruggedly developed arms can launch a flurry of 1,000 punches in just two seconds.

pokemon.name: bellsprout
pokemon.flavorText: Its bud looks like a human face. Because of the bud, it is rumored to be a type of legendary mandrake plant.

pokemon.name: weepinbell
pokemon.flavorText: The leafy parts act as cutters for slashing foes. It spits a fluid that dissolves everything.

pokemon.name: victreebel
pokemon.flavorText: Lures prey into its mouth with a honeylike aroma. The helpless prey is melted with a dissolving fluid.

pokemon.name: tentacool
pokemon.flavorText: Its eyes are as transparent as crystals. From them, it shoots mysterious beams of light.

pokemon.name: tentacruel
pokemon.flavorText: It has 80 tentacles that move about freely. They can sting, causing poisoning and sharp, stabbing pain.

pokemon.name: geodude

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket
Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

pokemon.flavorText: Its round form makes it easy to pick up. Some people have used them to hurl at each other in a snowball fight.

pokemon.name: graveler

encounters.location: Mt Ember 1f Cave Behind Team Rocket

pokemon.flavorText: Be careful while hiking on mountain trails. GRAVELER may come rolling down the path without slowing.

pokemon.name: golem
pokemon.flavorText: It is enclosed in a hard shell that is as rugged as slabs of rock. It sheds skin once a year to grow larger.

pokemon.name: ponyta
pokemon.flavorText: Its body is light, and its legs are incredibly powerful. It can clear Ayers Rock in one leap.

pokemon.name: rapidash
pokemon.flavorText: It can gallop at a top speed of 150 miles per hour. It can race as fast as a bullet train while ablaze.

pokemon.name: slowpoke
pokemon.flavorText: It is always vacantly lost in thought, but no one knows what it is thinking about. It is good at fishing with its tail.

pokemon.name: slowbro
pokemon.flavorText: When a SLOWPOKE went hunting in the sea, its tail was bitten by a SHELLDER. That made it evolve into SLOWBRO.

pokemon.name: magnemite
pokemon.flavorText: It moves while constantly hovering. It discharges THUNDER WAVE and so on from the units at its sides.

pokemon.name: magneton
pokemon.flavorText: A linked cluster formed of several MAGNEMITE. It discharges powerful magnetic waves at high voltage.

pokemon.name: farfetchd

encounters.notes: Trade a Spearow to NPC in Vermilion City house

pokemon.flavorText: It always walks about with a plant stalk clamped in its beak. The stalk is used for building its nest.

pokemon.name: doduo
pokemon.flavorText: A two-headed POKéMON that was discovered as a sudden mutation. It runs at a pace of over 60 miles per hour.

pokemon.name: dodrio
pokemon.flavorText: An odd species that is rarely found. The three heads respectively represent joy, sadness, and anger.

pokemon.name: seel
pokemon.flavorText: Covered with light blue fur, its hide is thick and tough. It is active in bitter cold of minus 40 degrees Fahrenheit.

pokemon.name: dewgong
pokemon.flavorText: Its body is covered with a pure white fur. The colder the weather, the more active it becomes.

pokemon.name: grimer
pokemon.flavorText: Sludge exposed to X rays from the moon transformed into GRIMER. It loves feeding on filthy things.

pokemon.name: muk
pokemon.flavorText: It is usually undetectable because it blends in with the ground. Touching it can cause terrible poisoning.

pokemon.name: shellder
pokemon.flavorText: It is encased in a shell that is harder than diamond. Inside, however, it is surprisingly tender.

pokemon.name: cloyster
pokemon.flavorText: Its shell is extremely hard. It cannot be shattered, even with a bomb. The shell opens only when it is attacking.

pokemon.name: gastly
pokemon.flavorText: A being that exists as a thin gas. It can topple an Indian elephant by enveloping the prey in two seconds.

pokemon.name: haunter
pokemon.flavorText: If you get the feeling of being watched in darkness when nobody is around, HAUNTER is there.

pokemon.name: gengar
pokemon.flavorText: It is said to emerge from darkness to steal the lives of those who become lost in mountains.

pokemon.name: onix
pokemon.flavorText: It usually lives underground. It searches for food while boring its way through the ground at 50 miles per hour.

pokemon.name: drowzee
pokemon.flavorText: A descendent of the legendary animal baku, which is said to eat dreams. It is skilled at hypnotism.

pokemon.name: hypno
pokemon.flavorText: It carries a pendulum-like device. There once was an incident in which it took away a child it hypnotized.

pokemon.name: krabby
pokemon.flavorText: It can be found near the sea. The large pincers grow back if they are torn out of their sockets.

pokemon.name: kingler
pokemon.flavorText: Its large and hard pincer has 10,000- horsepower strength. However, being so big, it is unwieldy to move.

pokemon.name: voltorb
pokemon.flavorText: A life-form whose identity is unknown. It is said to SCREECH or suddenly SELFDESTRUCT.

pokemon.name: electrode
pokemon.flavorText: It explodes in response to even minor stimuli. It is feared, with the nickname of “The Bomb Ball.”

pokemon.name: exeggcute
pokemon.flavorText: Even though it appears to be eggs of some sort, it was discovered to be a life- form more like plant seeds.

pokemon.name: exeggutor
pokemon.flavorText: It is called “The Walking Tropical Rainforest.” Each of the nuts has a face and a will of its own.

pokemon.name: cubone
pokemon.flavorText: It wears the skull of its dead mother on its head. When it becomes lonesome, it is said to cry loudly.

pokemon.name: marowak
pokemon.flavorText: It is small and was originally very weak. Its temperament turned ferocious when it began using bones.

pokemon.name: hitmonlee

encounters.notes: Choose Hitmonlee from Karate Master in Fighting Dojo (exclusive vs. Hitmonchan)

pokemon.flavorText: The legs freely contract and stretch. The stretchy legs allow it to hit a distant foe with a rising kick.

pokemon.name: hitmonchan

encounters.notes: Choose Hitmonchan from Karate Master in Fighting Dojo (exclusive vs. Hitmonlee)

pokemon.flavorText: The spirit of a pro boxer has infused this POKéMON. It throws punches that are faster than a bullet train.

pokemon.name: lickitung
pokemon.flavorText: Its tongue is twice the length of its body. It can be moved like an arm for grabbing food and attacking.

pokemon.name: koffing
pokemon.flavorText: Its thin, balloon-like body is inflated by horribly toxic gases. It reeks when it is nearby.

pokemon.name: weezing
pokemon.flavorText: Very rarely, a sudden mutation can result in two small KOFFING twins becoming conjoined as a WEEZING.

pokemon.name: rhyhorn
pokemon.flavorText: Strong, but not too bright, this POKéMON can shatter even a skyscraper with its charging TACKLES.

pokemon.name: rhydon
pokemon.flavorText: It begins walking on its hind legs after evolution. It can punch holes through boulders with its horn.

pokemon.name: chansey
pokemon.flavorText: It lays several eggs a day. The eggs are apparently rich in nutrients and extremely delicious.

pokemon.name: tangela
pokemon.flavorText: Blue plant vines cloak the POKéMON’s identity in a tangled mass. It entangles anything that gets close.

pokemon.name: kangaskhan
pokemon.flavorText: The female raises its offspring in a pouch on its belly. It is skilled at attacking using COMET PUNCH.

pokemon.name: horsea
pokemon.flavorText: It maintains balance using its tail, which is wound up like a coil. It may spray ink from its mouth.

pokemon.name: seadra
pokemon.flavorText: Its body bristles with sharp spikes. Carelessly trying to touch it could cause fainting from the spikes.

pokemon.name: goldeen
pokemon.flavorText: Its dorsal and pectoral fins are strongly developed like muscles. It can swim at a speed of five knots.

pokemon.name: seaking
pokemon.flavorText: The horn on its head is sharp like a drill. It bores a hole in a boulder to make its nest.

pokemon.name: staryu
pokemon.flavorText: It appears in large numbers by seashores. At night, its central core flashes with a red light.

pokemon.name: starmie
pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON has a geometric body. Because of its body, the locals suspect that it is an alien creature.

pokemon.name: mr-mime

encounters.notes: Trade an Abra to NPC outside Diglett's Cave entrance on Route 2

pokemon.flavorText: It is adept at conning people. It is said to be able to create walls out of thin air by miming.

pokemon.name: scyther
pokemon.flavorText: It tears and shreds prey with its wickedly sharp scythes. It very rarely spreads its wings to fly.

pokemon.name: jynx

encounters.notes: Trade a Poliwhirl to NPC in Cerulean City house

pokemon.flavorText: It speaks using a language that sounds human. Research is under way to determine what is being said.

pokemon.name: electabuzz
pokemon.flavorText: It loves to feed on strong electricity. It occasionally appears around large power plants and so on.

pokemon.name: magmar
pokemon.flavorText: Found near the mouth of a volcano. This fire-breather’s body temperature is nearly 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit.

pokemon.name: pinsir
pokemon.flavorText: Its two long pincer horns are powerful. Once they grip an enemy, they won’t release until the foe is torn.

pokemon.name: tauros

encounters.notes: Trade a Slowpoke to NPC on Route 16 (FireRed)

pokemon.flavorText: When it is about to TACKLE, it whips its body repeatedly with its three long tails.

pokemon.name: magikarp
pokemon.flavorText: It is virtually worthless in terms of both power and speed. It is the most weak and pathetic POKéMON in the world.

pokemon.name: gyarados
pokemon.flavorText: It has an extremely aggressive nature. The HYPER BEAM it shoots from its mouth totally incinerates all targets.

pokemon.name: lapras

encounters.notes: Given by Silph Co. employee on 7F after defeating Giovanni

pokemon.flavorText: Its high intelligence enables it to understand human speech. It likes to ferry people on its back.

pokemon.name: ditto
pokemon.flavorText: It can freely recombine its own cellular structure to transform into other life- forms.

pokemon.name: eevee

encounters.notes: Received from on top floor of Celadon Mansion

pokemon.flavorText: An extremely rare POKéMON that may evolve in a number of different ways depending on stimuli.

pokemon.name: vaporeon
pokemon.flavorText: Its body’s cellular structure is similar to the molecular composition of water. It can melt invisibly in water.

pokemon.name: jolteon
pokemon.flavorText: If it is angered or startled, the fur all over its body bristles like sharp needles that pierce foes.

pokemon.name: flareon
pokemon.flavorText: It has a flame bag inside its body. After inhaling deeply, it blows out flames of nearly 3,100 degrees Fahrenheit.

pokemon.name: porygon

encounters.notes: Purchased for 9,999 coins at Celadon Game Corner Prize Corner

pokemon.flavorText: Using the most advanced technologies, scientists finally succeeded in making the first artificial POKéMON.

pokemon.name: omanyte

encounters.notes: Revived from Dome Fossil at Cinnabar Lab
Pick Dome Fossil on Mt. Moon B2F (exclusive choice vs. Helix)

pokemon.flavorText: A prehistoric POKéMON that lived in the primordial sea, it swims by twisting its 10 tentacles about.

pokemon.name: omastar
pokemon.flavorText: Its tentacles are highly developed as if they are hands and feet. As soon as it ensnares prey, it bites.

pokemon.name: kabuto

encounters.notes: Revived from Helix Fossil at Cinnabar Lab
Pick Helix Fossil on Mt. Moon B2F (exclusive choice vs. Dome)

pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON was regenerated from the fossil of an ancient creature. It protects itself with a hard shell.

pokemon.name: kabutops
pokemon.flavorText: It swims freely through water. It catches prey with its scythe-like arms and drains the victim’s fluids.

pokemon.name: aerodactyl

encounters.notes: Revived from Old Amber at Cinnabar Lab
Receive Old Amber from scientist in Pewter Museum (back room)

pokemon.flavorText: It was regenerated from a dinosaur’s genetic matter that was found in amber. It flies with high-pitched cries.

pokemon.name: snorlax
pokemon.flavorText: It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.

pokemon.name: articuno

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found in Seafoam Islands B4F; requires Strength & Surf

pokemon.flavorText: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. With its long tail trailing behind, its flying form is magnificent.

pokemon.name: zapdos

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found deep in Power Plant on Route 10; requires Surf

pokemon.flavorText: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. While it is flying, it makes crackling and snapping sounds.

pokemon.name: moltres

encounters.notes: Lv.50 — found at top of Mt. Ember on One Island (post-game)

pokemon.flavorText: One of the legendary bird POKéMON. Those seeing it are overwhelmed by its orange wings that seem to be on fire.

pokemon.name: dratini
pokemon.flavorText: Even the young can exceed 6.5 feet in length. It grows larger by repeatedly shedding skin.

pokemon.name: dragonair
pokemon.flavorText: It is said to live in seas and lakes. Even though it has no wings, it has been seen flying occasionally.

pokemon.name: dragonite
pokemon.flavorText: It can fly in spite of its big and bulky physique. It circles the globe in just 16 hours.

pokemon.name: mewtwo

encounters.notes: Lv.70 — found in Cerulean Cave B1F; requires all 8 badges

pokemon.flavorText: A POKéMON whose genetic code was repeatedly recombined for research. It turned vicious as a result.

pokemon.name: mew

encounters.notes: Obtained via Nintendo Mystery Gift event (no longer available)

pokemon.flavorText: A POKéMON of South America that was thought to have been extinct. It is very intelligent and learns any move.

pokemon.name: sentret
pokemon.flavorText: It stands on its tail so it can see a long way. If it spots an enemy, it cries loudly to warn its kind.

pokemon.name: furret
pokemon.flavorText: There is no telling where its tail begins. Despite its short legs, it is quick at hunting RATTATA.

pokemon.name: ledyba
pokemon.flavorText: When the weather turns cold, numerous LEDYBA gather from everywhere to cluster and keep each other warm.

pokemon.name: ledian
pokemon.flavorText: The star patterns on its back grow larger or smaller depending on the number of stars in the night sky.

pokemon.name: spinarak
pokemon.flavorText: It spins a web using fine--but durable-- thread. It then waits patiently for prey to be trapped.

pokemon.name: ariados
pokemon.flavorText: A single strand of a special string is endlessly spun out of its rear. The string leads back to its nest.

pokemon.name: togepi
pokemon.flavorText: A proverb claims that happiness will come to anyone who can make a sleeping TOGEPI stand up.

pokemon.name: togetic
pokemon.flavorText: It grows dispirited if it is not with kind people. It can float in midair without moving its wings.

pokemon.name: natu
pokemon.flavorText: It usually forages for food on the ground but may, on rare occasions, hop onto branches to peck at shoots.

pokemon.name: xatu
pokemon.flavorText: In South America, it is said that its right eye sees the future and its left eye views the past.

pokemon.name: mareep
pokemon.flavorText: Its fleece grows continually. In the summer, the fleece is fully shed, but it grows back in a week.

pokemon.name: flaaffy
pokemon.flavorText: Its fluffy fleece easily stores electricity. Its rubbery hide keeps it from being electrocuted.

pokemon.name: ampharos
pokemon.flavorText: The bright light on its tail can be seen far away. It has been treasured since ancient times as a beacon.

pokemon.name: marill
pokemon.flavorText: The end of its tail serves as a buoy that keeps it from drowning, even in a vicious current.

pokemon.name: azumarill
pokemon.flavorText: When it plays in water, it rolls up its elongated ears to prevent their insides from getting wet.

pokemon.name: hoppip
pokemon.flavorText: Its body is so light, it must grip the ground firmly with its feet to keep from being blown away.

pokemon.name: skiploom
pokemon.flavorText: It spreads its petals to absorb sunlight. It also floats in the air to get closer to the sun.

pokemon.name: jumpluff
pokemon.flavorText: It drifts on seasonal winds and spreads its cotton-like spores all over the world to make more offspring.

pokemon.name: aipom
pokemon.flavorText: It lives atop tall trees. When leaping from branch to branch, it deftly uses its tail for balance.

pokemon.name: yanma
pokemon.flavorText: Its large eyes can scan 360 degrees. It looks in all directions to seek out insects as its prey.

pokemon.name: wooper
pokemon.flavorText: When it walks around on the ground, it coats its body with a slimy, poisonous film.

pokemon.name: quagsire
pokemon.flavorText: Due to its relaxed and carefree attitude, it often bumps its head on boulders and boat hulls as it swims.

pokemon.name: murkrow
pokemon.flavorText: It is said that when chased, it lures its attacker onto dark mountain trails where the foe will get lost.

pokemon.name: misdreavus
pokemon.flavorText: It loves to bite and yank people’s hair from behind without warning, just to see their shocked reactions.

pokemon.name: unown
pokemon.flavorText: Its flat, thin body is always stuck on walls. Its shape appears to have some meaning.

pokemon.name: wobbuffet
pokemon.flavorText: To keep its pitch-black tail hidden, it lives quietly in the darkness. It is never first to attack.

pokemon.name: pineco
pokemon.flavorText: It hangs and waits for flying-insect prey to come near. It does not move about much on its own.

pokemon.name: forretress
pokemon.flavorText: It remains immovably rooted to its tree. It scatters pieces of its hard shell to drive its enemies away.

pokemon.name: dunsparce
pokemon.flavorText: If spotted, it escapes by burrowing with its tail. It can hover just slightly using its wings.

pokemon.name: qwilfish
pokemon.flavorText: The small spikes covering its body developed from scales. They inject a toxin that causes fainting.

pokemon.name: shuckle
pokemon.flavorText: It stores BERRIES inside its shell. To avoid attacks, it hides beneath rocks and remains completely still.

pokemon.name: heracross
pokemon.flavorText: Usually docile, but if disturbed while sipping honey, it chases off the intruder with its horn.

pokemon.name: sneasel
pokemon.flavorText: Vicious in nature, it drives PIDGEY from their nests and feasts on the eggs that are left behind.

pokemon.name: teddiursa
pokemon.flavorText: Before food becomes scarce in wintertime, its habit is to hoard food in many hidden locations.

pokemon.name: ursaring
pokemon.flavorText: With its ability to distinguish any smell, it unfailingly finds all food buried deep underground.

pokemon.name: slugma
pokemon.flavorText: A common sight in volcanic areas, it slowly slithers around in a constant search for warm places.

pokemon.name: magcargo
pokemon.flavorText: Its brittle shell occasionally spouts intense flames that circulate throughout its body.

pokemon.name: swinub
pokemon.flavorText: If it smells something enticing, it dashes off headlong to find the source of the aroma.

pokemon.name: piloswine
pokemon.flavorText: If it charges at an enemy, the hairs on its back stand up straight. It is very sensitive to sound.

pokemon.name: remoraid
pokemon.flavorText: Using its dorsal fin as a suction pad, it clings to a MANTINE’s underside to scavenge for leftovers.

pokemon.name: octillery
pokemon.flavorText: It instinctively sneaks into rocky holes. If it gets sleepy, it steals the nest of a fellow OCTILLERY.

pokemon.name: delibird
pokemon.flavorText: It nests at the edge of sharp cliffs. It spends all day carrying food to its awaiting chicks.

pokemon.name: mantine
pokemon.flavorText: Swimming freely in open seas, it may fly out of the water and over the waves if it builds up enough speed.

pokemon.name: skarmory
pokemon.flavorText: After nesting in bramble bushes, the wings of its chicks grow hard from scratches by thorns.

pokemon.name: houndour
pokemon.flavorText: To corner prey, they check each other’s location using barks that only they can understand.

pokemon.name: houndoom
pokemon.flavorText: Upon hearing its eerie howls, other POKéMON get the shivers and head straight back to their nests.

pokemon.name: phanpy
pokemon.flavorText: As a sign of affection, it bumps with its snout. However, it is so strong, it may send you flying.

pokemon.name: donphan
pokemon.flavorText: The longer and bigger its tusks, the higher its rank in its herd. The tusks take a long time to grow.

pokemon.name: stantler
pokemon.flavorText: Those who stare at its antlers will gradually lose control of their senses and be unable to stand.

pokemon.name: smeargle
pokemon.flavorText: Once it becomes an adult, it has a tendency to let its comrades plant footprints on its back.

pokemon.name: raikou
pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON races across the land while barking a cry that sounds like crashing thunder.

pokemon.name: entei
pokemon.flavorText: A POKéMON that races across the land. It is said that one is born every time a new volcano appears.

pokemon.name: suicune
pokemon.flavorText: This POKéMON races across the land. It is said that north winds will somehow blow whenever it appears.

pokemon.name: larvitar
pokemon.flavorText: It is born deep underground. It can’t emerge until it has entirely consumed the soil around it.

pokemon.name: pupitar
pokemon.flavorText: Even sealed in its shell, it can move freely. Hard and fast, it has outstanding destructive power.

pokemon.name: tyranitar
pokemon.flavorText: Its body can’t be harmed by any sort of attack, so it is very eager to make challenges against enemies.

pokemon.name: lugia
pokemon.flavorText: It is said to be the guardian of the seas. It is rumored to have been seen on the night of a storm.

pokemon.name: ho-oh
pokemon.flavorText: A legend says that its body glows in seven colors. A rainbow is said to form behind it when it flies.

pokemon.name: celebi
pokemon.flavorText: When CELEBI disappears deep in a forest, it is said to leave behind an egg it brought from the future.

pokemon.name: deoxys-normal
pokemon.flavorText: This DEOXYS has transformed into its aggressive guise. It can fool enemies by altering its appearance.
